notes:
### v1.1.7

#### Added
- New General section in System settings.
- Toggle to hide or show the Set-Up Guide button in the header.
- Clear User Data option with a confirmation popup before local character data is deleted.
- System tray behavior: closing the window now hides LOA Tracker to the tray, with Show and Quit actions from the tray icon.
- Roster display order controls so the dashboard can show rosters in the order you choose.
- Lazy tracking behavior for Chaos Dungeon and Guardian Raid tasks, including row-wide toggle controls.
- Rested value validation for 0-100 values in 10-step increments.
- Early under-development Progression Planner groundwork for detailed character, equipment, engraving, and gem data.

#### Improved
- Windows startup now tries Task Scheduler first and falls back to the current-user registry startup entry when access is denied.
- Start with Lost Ark and Start with LOA Logs now work better with background monitor mode and tray behavior.
- LOA Tracker now reveals the existing tray/background window instead of spawning a duplicate instance.
- LOA Logs companion startup now requests an elevated Windows UAC launch when LOA Logs requires admin rights.
- Windows installer/update configuration now keeps the NSIS current-user LocalAppData install path instead of creating a Program Files copy.
- Favorite market items now stay pinned above the rest of the list, even while sorting by price.
- Tracking and ToDo task separators are left-aligned and stay visible while horizontally scrolling.
- Active roster controls stay visible while scrolling wide settings tables.
- Dashboard spacing was tightened across weekly gold, daily/weekly labels, roster view controls, and roster cards.
- Dashboard roster labels now sit inside the roster border with a smaller footprint.
- Weekly gold earned text now follows the same color progression style as the progress bar.
- Hidden dashboard characters still count toward daily and weekly totals.

#### Fixed
- Pressing Enter while renaming a roster no longer creates a duplicate empty roster entry.
- Roster renames now update all characters in the roster instead of only one character.
- Fixed the duplicate character key state that could break Roster Settings navigation.
- Roster rename popups no longer close accidentally when the mouse leaves the dialog area.
- Removed repeated Lost Ark monitor process-list debug spam from the logs.
- Fixed the elevated LOA Logs launch command so paths are passed correctly to PowerShell.
- Rested value fields no longer change accidentally when using the mouse wheel.

#### Changed
- Startup monitoring, companion monitoring, and tray behavior now work together for cleaner background tracking.
- Progression Planner remains marked as under development while scraper mappings, gem data, and goal valuation behavior are refined.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.1.7_x64-setup.exe` below.
